Vulnerabilities.Title: Unintended leak of Proxy-Authorization header
Vulnerabilities.Description: Requests is a HTTP library. Since Requests 2.3.0, Requests has been leaking Proxy-Authorization headers.

Vulnerabilities.Title: ReDoS in py.path.svnwc
Vulnerabilities.Description: The py library through 1.11.0 allows remote attackers to conduct a ReDoS.

Vulnerabilities.Title: Removal of e-Tugra root certificate
Vulnerabilities.Description: Certifi 2023.07.22 removes root certificates from e-Tugra.
